name: Curried Broccoli Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10 to 12 inch skillet, stir the curry powder over medium heat until it smells toasted, about 2 minutes.
2. Add broccoli slaw, orange peel, orange juice, and maple syrup. Cook over high heat for about 8 minutes, stirring frequently, until vegetables are cooked tender-crisp.
3. Stir in the cornstarch mixture and cook until boiling.
4. Add salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve hot over cooked rice. Garnish with chopped parsley or cilantro if desired.
6. This dish can be prepared in advance, refrigerated, and served cold as a salad.
